use_cases: Triggering form submissions and actions across web applications
Navigation triggers for links and route changes
Primary action buttons in dashboards and interfaces
Icon buttons for compact UI toolbars and controls
Ghost and outline buttons for secondary actions
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with class-variance-authority providing multiple style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Supports Radix UI Slot pattern for composition with asChild prop. Features standard focus-visible states and disabled handling with opacity transitions.
